title: Check-ins
description: A heartbeat or report from a scheduled job or cron monitor. state indicates whether the run succeeded, failed, or reported its status.

check_in_id.description: Stable identifier for the monitored check-in / job.

state.description: Reported state of the run. reporting = the job sent a heartbeat for the scheduled window; missing = the window expired without a heartbeat; paused = the monitor is currently paused.

payload.description: Optional user-supplied body, only present on advanced check-ins. Shape is caller-defined; reference subkeys as payload.<name>::<type> and prefer @preview to inspect a sample before guessing field names.
